close_notes:
<!-- do-not-process -->
(All Timestamps must be in UTC)
Issue Summary: VM provision failed: API errors: 500: 
SME Findings: 
Reason of Escalation: 
Resolution Steps: caused by brief Cloudflare outage 
Signature of Issue :VM provision failed: API errors: 500: 
Jira/Github/Other Tickets: 
Category/Subcategory: is-vpc 	Service 	CIS
Timeline Summary: Troubleshooting steps/commands executed so far:

* 2025-12-05 09:00 UTC : Core team observed dashboards going red and found out that the cloudflare had an outage
* 2025-12-05 09:05 UTC : Core team opened a warroom warroom-vpc-inc10481030 and teams call open
* 2025-12-05 09:10 UTC : Core team noticed that the cloud.ibm.com page was not reachable and increased the severity to sev-2 CIE
* 2025-12-05 09:15 UTC : Corea team could see the provisioning dashboard recovering, but the cloud page was still down
* 2025-12-05 09:15 UTC : Cloudflare status page updated that they have fixed the issue https://www.cloudflarestatus.com/incidents/lfrm31y6sw9q
* 2025-12-05 09:20 UTC : cloud.ibm.com was accessible 
* 2025-12-05 09:25 UTC: Paged LB team PDE7710194 to check if their services were up and running.


Resolution Runbook: Not Needed
Caused by Change/Incident: 
Warroom: warroom-vpc-inc10481030
Meeting URL: 
Outage Start: 
Outage End :
